title: Spiffo Plush (Totem)
description: Adds a plush toy from the paid game Project Zomboid (zombie survival) directly into Minecraft!
body:
Quite a popular toy, which is remembered by many as the main symbol of the Zomboid project! There are people who draw art using it, and I decided to add its implementation to the game! The game itself is made in pixel design, which is similar to the style of Minecraft!

### The model itself changes the Totem of Undying, as well as its name in supported languages.

![Showing two versions of the toy.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLxgWBV2/images/78a68c7fa0c533e5114761b30382a02f68332344.png)

### At the moment, two resource packs have been made, with the versions of the toys they were sold in directly by the game developers:
- an ordinary survivor who has only recently begun to master the game;
- a survivor who has seen and gone through more than one horde.

![In hand v1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLxgWBV2/images/c71cade8961f7e794b008ad8478427d47595cf35.png)
